tasks.subject: Task 1: Remove editing toggle and clean up CSS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Delete the `editing` state, `diary-display` div, and all associated `.diary-display` CSS — leaving the textarea always visible.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/DiaryPage.tsx`
- Modify: `src/components/DiaryPage.css`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `editing` state and all `setEditing` calls are gone from `DiaryPage.tsx`
- [ ] `diary-display` div and its `onClick` handler are gone
- [ ] Textarea has no `display` inline style
- [ ] No `.diary-display` selector appears anywhere in `DiaryPage.css`
- [ ] `npm run build` exits 0 with no TypeScript errors

**Verify:** `npm run build` → `✓ built in`

acceptanceCriteria: editing state and all setEditing calls are gone
diary-display div and onClick handler are gone
textarea has no display inline style

tasks.subject: Task 2: Fix auto-resize and add visualViewport keyboard scroll
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Resize textarea correctly on load/navigation, and scroll content into view when the iOS keyboard appears.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/DiaryPage.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Auto-resize useEffect has no editing guard and runs on both text and currentDate changes
- [ ] A visualViewport resize listener is registered on mount and cleaned up on unmount
- [ ] When keyboard appears and textarea is focused, window.scrollTo(0, visualViewport.offsetTop) is called
- [ ] npm run build exits 0

**Verify:** `npm run build` → `✓ built in`

acceptanceCriteria: auto-resize useEffect has no editing guard
runs on text and currentDate changes
visualViewport resize listener registered and cleaned up
